prompt: High-quality Japanese anime style, fantasy world. A tiny 'chibi angel' (Figure 1) with white wings is flying gracefully through a mysterious forest. The chibi angel is cute and stylized, with soft glowing wings that emit a gentle light. The forest is mystical, dotted with giant trees, twisted trunks, floating light particles, and bioluminescent plants and mushrooms. A light mist drifts through the space, creating a deep, mysterious atmosphere. Sunlight filtering through the trees mixes with magical light to produce a dreamlike world. The camera uses a dynamic composition, chasing the chibi angel to depict it gliding through the air. Expressing motion blur for a sense of speed, wind currents, and the trajectory of flapping wings. Lighting is soft and fantastic, with a color palette based on green, blue, and gold. Light particles and volume lights fill the space. Ultra-high definition, cinematic, deep composition, aerial perspective, excellent artwork. No text, no logos, do not make it overly realistic (maintain anime expression).
